summary: Comprehensive testing of TON City authentication system completed successfully. All auth endpoints and frontend flows are working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Admin user does not have is_admin flag set to true in response

design_issues.issue: Language selector not clearly visible during automated testing

passed_tests: Backend API - Registration initiate (SMTP not configured, direct registration)
Backend API - Email verification endpoint (proper error handling)
Backend API - Login with email and username
Backend API - Error handling (duplicate email, short password)
Frontend - Registration form submission and redirect
Frontend - Login form with admin credentials
Frontend - Form validation and error messages
Frontend - User interface styling and layout
